class.name: rmgo_core/CommandEndpointGzInterface
class.description: Gazebo ros2_control loopback system for declared scalar GPIO command interfaces.

class.name: rmgo_core/OmniInfantryGzInterface
class.description: Gazebo whole-robot I/O interface for OmniInfantry controller-chain development.

class.name: rmgo_core/RefereeGzSystemInterface
class.description: Gazebo referee mock state source for controller-chain development.

class.name: rmgo_core/RefereeSystemInterface
class.description: ROS 2 control referee transport interface with realtime scalar state exports.
